examples: The policeman asked me to blow into the breathalyser.
The accused question the result of the breathalyser test.
The device resembles a breathalyser, with a moveable plastic straw attached to a motorised box.
The government is considering the introduction of a drug test, similar to a breathalyser, for motorists.
It may be the next step forward from Mr Borkenstein's breathalyser of 50 years ago.
